workLog.action: Session start protocol: Serena initialized, HANDOFF/SESSION-PROTOCOL/PROJECT-CONSTRAINTS read, issue #2030 fetched via github skill
workLog.outcome: No per-issue handoff for 2030 (new issue). Protocol gates satisfied.

workLog.action: Diagnosed git worktree failure: shared config core.bare=true with extensions.worktreeConfig but no per-worktree override
workLog.outcome: Fixed with 'git config --worktree core.bare false'. git status works.

workLog.action: Explored repo conventions (schemas, hooks, evals, personas, CI) via Explore subagent
workLog.outcome: Confirmed: eval fixtures are plain JSON (policy_id added as a field); no jsonschema dependency in repo; thin-workflow CI pattern; 24 agent personas.

workLog.action: Implemented skillbook: 4 JSON schemas, scripts/skillbook.py CLI, scripts/validation/validate_skillbook.py, seed data (30 policies / 1 tension / 3 workflows), post-eval hook, CI workflow, README
workLog.outcome: All 10 issue #2030 acceptance criteria met. 100 pytest tests pass, 96% coverage on skillbook.py.

workLog.action: Decision: did not add the jsonschema library; wrote a small purpose-built draft-07 subset checker instead
workLog.outcome: Matches the repo precedent validate_session_json.py (hand-rolled validation, no jsonschema dependency); no supply-chain expansion.

workLog.action: QA agent validated the feature: PASS WITH CONCERNS
workLog.outcome: Resolved concern C1 (extended seed from 13 to all 24 personas) and C4 (added agent/** to the CI push trigger).

workLog.action: Critic agent reviewed before PR: APPROVED_WITH_CONCERNS, all 10 criteria PASS
workLog.outcome: Resolved findings 1,2,3,4,6,7 in-session (naming disambiguation, idempotency-key docs, scope note, assertion comment, 2 added tests). Finding 5 (wire validator into pre_pr.py) carried as a follow-up.

nextSteps: Follow-up: wire scripts/validation/validate_skillbook.py into scripts/validation/pre_pr.py for shift-left local validation (critic finding 5).
Follow-up: wire select output into agent prompts or session start so the skillbook has a consumer.
